response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and shows breadth across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators). However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and strategic engineering leadership — the resume reflects a strong senior/staff-level hands-on developer without evidence of AI research depth, large-scale platform strategy, or organizational influence at the level this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong open-source, community, and knowledge-sharing track record (talks, workshops, founded GISCollective)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale the role requires
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC — no evidence of director-level strategic or advisory leadership
Limited demonstrated cloud platform strategy experience; no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap to director-level strategy role
Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Long, broad engineering experience meeting the 15-year minimum
